# novu_api_key (Data Source)

Api key data source. Retrieve a single API key for an environment if set, otherwise try to retrieve a single API key for all the environments within the organization. Will fail if multiple API keys are found.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `environment_id` (String) The environment id

### Read-Only

- `hash` (String) The api key hash
- `owner_id` (String) ID of the user that owns the api key
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The api key value
